write.audioHint: Used to sync timestamps for each verse.
write.lyricsPlaceholder:
Write the lyrics here...

Each line is a verse.
Use blank lines to separate stanzas.

Example:
I see trees of green
Red roses too
I'll see them bloom
write.lyricsHint: One line = one verse. Blank lines are ignored when syncing.
